title: Curland Decorators proudly voted Best Interior Designer in Mossel Bay
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS -  Curland Decorators is honoured to be named Best Interior Designer in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards 2025.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Curland Decorators is honoured to be named Best Interior Designer in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Established in 1994 by the Steyn family, our business has proudly served the community for 31 years, offering quality curtains, décor, and accessories crafted right here in our Mossel Bay workshops."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From day one, our philosophy has been clear – never compromise on quality, value each client as our most important asset, and deliver on our promises with professionalism and punctuality. These values have guided our journey and built the loyal customer base we are privileged to serve today.","html":"From day one, our philosophy has been clear – never compromise on quality, value each client as our most important asset, and deliver on our promises with professionalism and punctuality. These values have guided our journey and built the loyal customer base we are privileged to serve today."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our business has always been rooted in strong family values, with the Steyn family’s vision and commitment forming the heart of everything we do. Supported by a dedicated team of 12 highly skilled employees, every project receives the care, expertise and passion it deserves.","html":"Our business has always been rooted in strong family values, with the Steyn family’s vision and commitment forming the heart of everything we do. Supported by a dedicated team of 12 highly skilled employees, every project receives the care, expertise and passion it deserves."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We extend our deepest gratitude to the people of Mossel Bay for trusting us over the years and for voting for us in this year’s awards. Your continued support is the reason we strive to be better every day.","html":"We extend our deepest gratitude to the people of Mossel Bay for trusting us over the years and for voting for us in this year’s awards. Your continued support is the reason we strive to be better every day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We look forward to transforming spaces and creating beauty in our community for many years to come.","html":"We look forward to transforming spaces and creating beauty in our community for many years to come."},{"type":"list","items":["044 691 2448","[email protected]"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Curland Decorators proudly voted Best Interior Designer in Mossel Bay
